lex.botversion.CfnAbout:
Specifies a new version of the bot based on the `DRAFT` version. If the `DRAFT` version of this resource hasn't changed since you created the last version, Amazon Lex doesn't create a new version, it returns the last created version.

When you specify the first version of a bot, Amazon Lex sets the version to 1. Subsequent versions increment by 1.

lex.botversion.BotId.Description: The unique identifier of the bot.

lex.botversion.BotVersionLocaleSpecifica.Description: Specifies the locales that Amazon Lex adds to this version. You can choose the Draft version or any other previously published version for each locale. When you specify a source version, the locale data is copied from the source version to the new version.
